scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const w=p.join('node_modules','pdfjs-dist','build','pdf.worker.mjs');['apps/hub/public','apps/blueprint-standalone/public'].forEach(d=>{fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(w,p.join(d,'pdf.worker.mjs'))});console.log('PDF.js worker copied to public dirs')"
